request_payload.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how vital preparedness is for national security. The current system saves lives - just look at the 2024 earthquake response where early warning systems reduced casualties by 32%. We can't afford to weaken these protections. Our duty is clear: maintain and strengthen civil defense infrastructure. #NationalSecurity #PreparednessMatters
